inputs.label: Booked Nights
inputs.businessContext: Total number of nights booked in the period.

inputs.label: Total Available Nights
inputs.businessContext: Total nights the property was available for booking.

inputs.label: Average Daily Rate
inputs.businessContext: Average nightly rental rate before fees.

inputs.label: Cleaning Fee per Booking
inputs.businessContext: Fixed cleaning fee added per booking.

inputs.label: Number of Bookings
inputs.businessContext: Total number of separate bookings in the period.

inputs.label: Fixed Monthly Costs
inputs.businessContext: All fixed monthly expenses (mortgage, utilities, insurance, etc.).
